allow: Bash(.venvScriptspython.exe -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f''src/local_ai_platform/{f}'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\).read\(\)\) or print\(f''{f}: OK''\) for f in [''config.py'',''db.py'',''memory.py'',''agents.py'',''tools.py'',''tracing.py'',''formatting.py'']]")

Bash(.venvScriptspython.exe -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f''src/local_ai_platform/providers/{f}'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\).read\(\)\) or print\(f''providers/{f}: OK''\) for f in [''__init__.py'',''base.py'',''ollama_provider.py'',''huggingface_provider.py'',''llamacpp_provider.py'',''openai_compatible_provider.py'',''router.py'']]")

Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\(''items'',[]\); print\(f''Total models: {len\(items\)}''\); [print\(f''  {i[""provider""]:12} {i[""name""]:35} {i.get\(""size_human"",""?""\)}''\) for i in items]")
Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''provider_status:'', d.get\(''provider_status''\)\)")

Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); ps=d.get\(''provider_status'',{}\); print\(''provider_status:'', json.dumps\(ps\)\)")

Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); ps=d.get\(''provider_status'',{}\); print\(''provider_status:'', json.dumps\(ps, indent=2\)\); print\(''items:'', len\(d.get\(''items'',[]\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Ollama running: {len\(d.get\(""models"",[]\)\)} models''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''provider_status:'', d.get\(''provider_status'', ''MISSING''\)\); print\(''items count:'', len\(d.get\(''items'', []\)\)\)")
Bash(wmic process where ProcessId=42800 get CommandLine,Name)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''provider_status:'', json.dumps\(d.get\(''provider_status'', ''MISSING''\)\)\); print\(''items count:'', len\(d.get\(''items'', []\)\)\)")
Bash(# Clear cache and test with Ollama running curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/models/refresh && sleep 1 && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/models/catalog)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);items=d[''items''];print\(f''vLLM library: {len\(items\)} models''\);[print\(f''  {m[""model_id""]:50s} p={str\(m.get\(""param_count_human"",""-""\)\):>8s} s={str\(m.get\(""size_human"",""-""\)\):>10s} dl={m.get\(""downloads"",0\)}''\) for m in items[:8]];print\(f''{sum\(1 for m in items if m.get\(""param_count""\)\)}/{len\(items\)} with size''\)")
